assertions.title: Browser+ATS yields mixed attribution with lane status

steps.expected: Run reaches terminal state with sources array populated
steps.observed: Run terminalized after ~5 minutes with status 'partial' and sources populated

steps.action: Verify sources contains BOTH browser and ATS lanes
steps.observed: sources contains all 3: greenhouse, ashby (ATS), grounded_web (browser)

steps.action: Verify each source has explicit counters
steps.expected: Each source has pagesVisited, leadsSeen, leadsAccepted counters
steps.observed: All 3 sources have: pagesVisited, leadsSeen, leadsAccepted, leadsRejected counters

steps.action: Verify each source has warnings array
steps.observed: greenhouse: warnings: [], ashby: warnings: [], grounded_web: warnings: ['Grounded search returned no usable candidate links.' x2]

assertions.title: Lane-specific failure never appears as full success

steps.action: Verify failing lane attribution in warnings
steps.observed: Warnings include: 'Truncated leads to maxLeadsPerRun=20.', 'Grounded search returned no usable candidate links.' (x2) - grounded_web lane warnings present

steps.action: Verify terminal state has explicit failure indication
steps.expected: Terminal run shows partial/failed with attribution
steps.observed: lifecycle.state: 'partial', writeResult shows appended:0 updated:13 (partial write success), grounded_web warnings indicate browser lane quality issues

evidence.network: GET /runs/run_96720e78010441be8eb64df1818e2a0d -> 200 with partial status and warnings

frictions.description: browser_plus_ats preset takes ~5 minutes to terminalize, longer than ats_only (2-3 min) mentioned in user-testing.md
frictions.resolution: Waited for run to complete naturally

summary: Tested 2 assertions: Both passed. VAL-CROSS-003: Confirmed browser_plus_ats yields 3 sources (greenhouse, ashby, grounded_web) with explicit per-source counters and warnings arrays. VAL-CROSS-004: Confirmed run terminalizes with 'partial' status (not 'success') and lane-specific warnings for grounded_web browser lane.
